name: Ideas
description: Propose a new feature or direction for Samaris OS
title: "[IDEA] Short title"
labels: ["idea"]
body: |

  ## What problem does this solve?
  Describe the user need or technical gap.

  ## Proposed Solution
  Describe your idea in detail.

  ## Alternatives Considered
  What else did you consider?

  ## Use Cases
  Who would benefit from this? When would they use it?

  ## Additional Context
  Any mockups, references, or related links.

  ---
  *Ideas: contact.samaris.os@gmail.com*
